name: Microsoft Clarity MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Microsoft Clarity MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Microsoft Clarity UX analytics — querying session recordings, heatmap data, user behavior metrics, page performance insights, and integrating Clarity's behavioral analytics into agent-driven UX optimization and web performance analysis workflows.
use_cases: Querying UX heatmap data for page optimization from UX analysis agents
Analyzing session recording metrics from user experience agents
Identifying rage clicks and dead clicks from UX debugging agents
Tracking user scroll depth and engagement from content optimization agents
Monitoring page performance and interaction metrics from product analytics agents
Comparing UX metrics across page variations from A/B testing agents
not_for: Teams using Hotjar, FullStory, or other UX tools (different platform)
Transactional analytics (use Google Analytics, Mixpanel for event analytics)
best_when: An agent needs to analyze user behavior data from Microsoft Clarity — for UX optimization, identifying friction points, or understanding how users interact with web pages.
avoid_when: You're using Hotjar, FullStory, or another UX analytics tool — or if you need event-based analytics (use Google Analytics or Mixpanel instead).

auth.notes: Microsoft Clarity API key from Clarity dashboard settings. Project ID required. Key grants access to specific Clarity project data. No OAuth required — simple API key auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Microsoft Clarity: completely free, no limits
pricing.notes: Microsoft Clarity is completely free — no paid tiers, no session limits, no feature gates. Official Microsoft MCP server is open source and free.

known_agent_gotchas: Clarity data has delay — session data may be 24-48 hours behind
Project ID and site URL must match registered Clarity project
Heatmap data is aggregated — individual session data requires separate session API
Rate limits not publicly documented — implement conservative querying
Clarity must be installed on the target website — no data if tracking script not present
Official Microsoft MCP — newer project, API surface may be limited compared to Clarity UI
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR. Official Microsoft MCP. Protect API key. Clarity processes user behavior data — ensure GDPR consent mechanism on your website.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR. Official Microsoft MCP. Protect API key. Clarity captures user sessions — ensure proper privacy consent on website.
